607 TRNSFSN_ADMSN_CD TRNSFSN_ADMSN_CD Other: Transfusions (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving transfusions. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
